input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation commonly demonstrates YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON config files, but those require separate hoplite-* format modules; meaningful hoplite-core coverage should use MapPropertySource, SystemPropertiesPropertySource, EnvironmentVariablesPropertySource, or built-in .props/.properties parsing unless the workflow intentionally adds a format module.

Version 3.0 changes environment variable path conventions, so tests that choose to exercise EnvironmentVariablesPropertySource must set variables in the new upper-case underscore style; this is optional test design, not required setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is required: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves with normal transitive Kotlin/coroutines dependencies and includes usable core APIs, default decoders, MapPropertySource, environment/system-property sources, and a built-in Java properties parser.
